title: Coordinate mod
description: The "TCO" (Coordinate Points) mod adds the ability to customize the display of coordinates through a convenient interface. By pressing the T key, a special menu opens, allowing players to adjust the position of the coordinate display on the screen. The me
body: The "TCO" (Coordinate Points) mod adds the ability to customize the display of coordinates through a convenient interface. By pressing the T key, a special menu opens, allowing players to adjust the position of the coordinate display on the screen. The menu provides an option to move the coordinates to a more suitable spot, ensuring it doesn't interfere with gameplay while still offering quick access to important location information. This mod is perfect for players who want to fine-tune the placement of their coordinates for better visibility and a more personalized interface.
